meaning: n.无用信息,杂乱信号,复述vt.切细,搞糟,推敲n.无用信息,杂乱信号
examples: I made a real hash of the interview.
I want grits with my eggs instead of hash browns.
It failed because the compreg opcode assumes a hash to initialized.
In August 1996 Priory, Anderson and their lieutenants met to hash out the details.
It's not often you order plantain hash with fried ceviche and come out smiling.
